title: epilobium alpinum subsp. anagallidifolium
intro: Epilobium alpinum subsp. anagallidifolium, commonly known as Alpine Willowherb, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the willowherb family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Alpine Willowherb include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe wounds, and support immune function. Alpine Willowherb is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
